references.hebrew: א֣וֹ נֶ֡פֶשׁ כִּ֣י תִשָּׁבַע֩ לְבַטֵּ֨א בִשְׂפָתַ֜יִם לְהָרַ֣ע ׀ א֣וֹ לְהֵיטִ֗יב לְ֠כֹ֠ל אֲשֶׁ֨ר יְבַטֵּ֧א הָאָדָ֛ם בִּשְׁבֻעָ֖ה וְנֶעְלַ֣ם מִמֶּ֑נּוּ וְהוּא־יָדַ֥ע וְאָשֵׁ֖ם לְאַחַ֥ת מֵאֵֽלֶּה׃
references.english: Or when a person uttersbutters Lit. “utters with his lips.” an oath to bad or good purpose (whatever a human being may utter in an oath) and, though knowing about it, does not attend to it, but later they realize their guilt in any of these matters—

commentary_links.hebrew: וְנֶ֣פֶשׁ כִּֽי־תֶחֱטָ֗א וְשָֽׁמְעָה֙ ק֣וֹל אָלָ֔ה וְה֣וּא עֵ֔ד א֥וֹ רָאָ֖ה א֣וֹ יָדָ֑ע אִם־ל֥וֹא יַגִּ֖יד וְנָשָׂ֥א עֲוֺנֽוֹ׃
commentary_links.english:
If a person incurs guilt—
When someone has heard a public imprecationaimprecation Namely, against one who withholds testimony. but (although able to testify as having seen or learned of the matter) has not given information and thus is subject to punishment;
commentary_links.matched_snippet: ראה או ידע בעדות המתקיימת בראיה בלא

commentary_links.hebrew: עַל־פִּ֣י ׀ שְׁנַ֣יִם עֵדִ֗ים א֛וֹ שְׁלֹשָׁ֥ה עֵדִ֖ים יוּמַ֣ת הַמֵּ֑ת לֹ֣א יוּמַ֔ת עַל־פִּ֖י עֵ֥ד אֶחָֽד׃
commentary_links.english: A person shall be put to death only on the testimony of two or moreamore Lit. “three.” witnesses; no one shall be put to death on the testimony of a single witness.—
commentary_links.matched_snippet: על פי שנים עדים או שלשה עדים יומת

commentary_links.hebrew: נֶ֚פֶשׁ כִּ֣י תֶחֱטָ֔א וּמָעֲלָ֥ה מַ֖עַל בַּיהֹוָ֑ה וְכִחֵ֨שׁ בַּעֲמִית֜וֹ בְּפִקָּד֗וֹן אֽוֹ־בִתְשׂ֤וּמֶת יָד֙ א֣וֹ בְגָזֵ֔ל א֖וֹ עָשַׁ֥ק אֶת־עֲמִיתֽוֹ׃
commentary_links.english: When a person sins and commits a trespass against GOD—by dealing deceitfully with another in the matter of a deposit or a pledge,epledge Meaning of Heb. tesumeth yad uncertain. or through robbery, or by defrauding another,
commentary_links.matched_snippet: עשה בה מושבע כנשבע ומזיד כשוגג &star תלמוד

commentary_links.hebrew: וְאֶת־אֲשָׁמ֥וֹ יָבִ֖יא לַיהֹוָ֑ה אַ֣יִל תָּמִ֧ים מִן־הַצֹּ֛אן בְּעֶרְכְּךָ֥ לְאָשָׁ֖ם אֶל־הַכֹּהֵֽן׃
commentary_links.english: Then [the sinner] shall bring to the priest, as a penalty to GOD, a ram without blemish from the flock, or the equivalent,fthe equivalent In currency; cf. v. 15. as a reparation offering.

commentary_links.hebrew: א֠וֹ מִכֹּ֞ל אֲשֶׁר־יִשָּׁבַ֣ע עָלָיו֮ לַשֶּׁ֒קֶר֒ וְשִׁלַּ֤ם אֹתוֹ֙ בְּרֹאשׁ֔וֹ וַחֲמִשִׁתָ֖יו יֹסֵ֣ף עָלָ֑יו לַאֲשֶׁ֨ר ה֥וּא ל֛וֹ יִתְּנֶ֖נּוּ בְּי֥וֹם אַשְׁמָתֽוֹ׃
commentary_links.english: or anything else about which they swore falsely, they shall repay the principal amount and add a fifth part to it. It shall be paid to its owner upon realizing that guilt.

commentary_links.hebrew: וְהָיָ֥ה כִֽי־יֶאְשַׁ֖ם לְאַחַ֣ת מֵאֵ֑לֶּה וְהִ֨תְוַדָּ֔ה אֲשֶׁ֥ר חָטָ֖א עָלֶֽיהָ׃
commentary_links.english: upon realizing their guilt in any of these matters, that person shall confess having sinned in that way.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: יאשם לאחת מאלה יש מאלה שהוא חייב
